seoTitle: Ranelagh vs Ranga — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Ranelagh and Ranga. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Ranelagh and Ranga.
heading: Ranelagh vs Ranga — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Ranelagh, Tasmania and Ranga, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Ranelagh and Ranga have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Ranelagh or Ranga safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Ranelagh has a flood risk score of 33/100, while Ranga scores 30/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Ranelagh scores 18/100 for bushfire risk. Ranga scores 34/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Ranelagh or Ranga?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Ranelagh has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.65% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
